summary: Tested technical details Excel import feature for Facette e-commerce admin panel. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working.
seed_data_creation: Created test Excel files at /tmp/test_technical_match.xlsx for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Technical details Excel import feature is fully functional. Backend endpoints: POST /api/products/attributes/import-technical-xlsx (parses Excel, matches products by name) and POST /api/products/attributes/apply-technical-xlsx (applies attributes to matched products). Frontend: 'Teknik Detay Yükle' button visible on /admin/urunler page, product edit modal has 'Özellikler' tab with global attributes displayed.

features_tested.import_technical_xlsx_endpoint: PASS - Parses Excel file with UrunKartID|StokKodu|UrunAdi|Ozellik|Deger format, matches products by name with fuzzy matching
features_tested.apply_technical_xlsx_endpoint: PASS - Applies matched attributes to products, updates global attribute library
features_tested.teknik_detay_yukle_button: PASS - Orange button visible on products page (/admin/urunler)
features_tested.product_edit_attributes_tab: PASS - 'Özellikler' tab shows attributes with values (BEDEN, BOY, KALIP, KUMAS TİPİ, etc.)
features_tested.new_product_attributes: PASS - Global attributes available in new product form
features_tested.empty_file_handling: PASS - Returns 400 error for empty Excel files
features_tested.invalid_product_id_handling: PASS - Gracefully handles non-existent product IDs
